ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_name" TEXT /* Name of the match (e.g., Team A vs Team B) */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the match belongs to */,
  "tournament" TEXT /* Tournament the match belongs to */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., international, domestic) */,
  "umpires" TEXT /* Umpires for the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the match was played */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the match was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Name of the team's home ground */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "nick_name" TEXT /* Nickname of the player */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* URL of the player's image */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "career_span" TEXT /* Years the player has been active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_players" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the player participated in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player played for */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Batting order of the player in the match */,
  "bowling_order" INTEGER /* Bowling order of the player in the match */,
  "dismissal_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., bowled, caught, lbw) */,
  "dismissed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the player who dismissed the batsman */,
  "catcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who caught the batsman */,
  "stumped_by" INTEGER /* ID of the player who stumped the batsman */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_stats" (
  "bowling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowling stat */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the bowling stat belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the bowling stat belongs to */,
  "overs" REAL /* Number of overs bowled by the player */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded by the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "economy" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  "best_figures" TEXT /* Best figures of the player in the match */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "batting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting stat */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the batting stat belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the batting stat belongs to */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit by the player */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the player */,
  "best_score" INTEGER /* Best score of the player in the match */,
  "fifties" INTEGER /* Number of fifties scored by the player */,
  "hundreds" INTEGER /* Number of hundreds scored by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the match data (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
